title: Department Manager Vacancy at Berger Silk Store - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Berger Silk Store - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
